seoDescription: Get fit-for-purpose equipment backed by expert sizing, commissioning, and lifecycle support.

hero.heading: Generator & Equipment Sales
hero.body: GenFix supplies fit-for-purpose diesel generator and power equipment packages backed by sizing support, commissioning, and post-sale service pathways.

sections.title: How GenFix Sales Works
sections.body: Our sales process prioritises technical fit and lifecycle value so the selected equipment performs reliably in real operating conditions.

cards.title: Load-Based Sizing
cards.description: We assess demand profile, startup current, and runtime goals before recommending equipment.

cards.title: Specification And Compliance
cards.description: GenFix aligns product specification to site standards, handover requirements, and risk controls.

cards.title: Procurement Planning
cards.description: Lead times, delivery sequencing, and commissioning windows are planned before procurement lock-in.

sections.title: Beyond The Purchase Order
sections.body: GenFix supports successful commissioning and ongoing performance after equipment is delivered.

cards.title: Commissioning And Acceptance
cards.description: Structured testing verifies output stability, alarms, and site integration before handover.

cards.title: Operator Handover
cards.description: Teams receive practical operating guidance, documentation, and escalation pathways.

cards.title: Lifecycle Service Options
cards.description: Maintenance plans and field response options protect equipment performance over time.
